problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
